sqlMap.select: select COUNT(*) as Count, SUM(Amount) as Amount, SUM(ThirdFee) as ThirdFee from withdrawlog where to_days(CreateTime) = to_days(now()) and withdrawlog.AppId = #appId# and Status = 2

SELECT COUNT(*) as Count, SUM(Amount) as Amount, SUM(ThirdFee) as ThirdFee FROM withdrawlog where DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) <= date(CreateDay)
and withdrawlog.AppId = #appId#
SELECT COUNT(*) as Count, SUM(Amount) as Amount, SUM(ThirdFee) as ThirdFee FROM withdrawlog WHERE TO_DAYS(NOW()) - TO_DAYS(CreateDay) <= 1 and withdrawlog.AppId = #appId# and Status = 2

SELECT * FROM withdrawlog w left join cpinfo c on w.AppId = c.AppId left join withdrawtype wd on w.WithdrawTypeId=wd.Id where w.AppId = #appId#
w.Id = #Id#
w.OrderId = #OrderId#
w.Type = #Type#
w.WithdrawTypeId = #typeid#
w.Status = #Status#
w.CreateTime >= #startTime#
w.CreateTime <= #endTime#
order by w.CreateTime desc
limit $rowIndex$,$limit$

SELECT count(w.Id) FROM withdrawlog w left join cpinfo c on w.AppId = c.AppId left join withdrawtype wd on w.WithdrawTypeId=wd.Id where w.AppId = #appId#
w.Id = #Id#
w.OrderId = #OrderId#
w.Type = #Type#
w.WithdrawTypeId = #typeid#
w.Status = #Status#
w.CreateTime >= #startTime#
w.CreateTime <= #endTime#

SELECT count(*) FROM withdrawlog w left join cpinfo c on w.AppId = c.AppId left join withdrawtype wd on w.WithdrawTypeId=wd.Id where 1=1
w.AppId = #appId#
w.Id = #id#
w.OrderId = #orderId#
w.Status = #status#
w.CreateTime = #CreateTime#
order by w.CreateTime desc

SELECT Withdrawlog.Id, Withdrawlog.AppId, Withdrawlog.OrderId, Withdrawlog.Amount, Withdrawlog.PlatformFee, Withdrawlog.Type, Withdrawlog.BankCardNo, Withdrawlog.BankCode, Withdrawlog.BranchCode, Withdrawlog.BankAccountName, Withdrawlog.Currency, Withdrawlog.Email, Withdrawlog.Mobile, Withdrawlog.`Status`, Withdrawlog.CreateTime, Withdrawlog.WithdrawTime, Withdrawlog.Ip, Withdrawlog.SyncCnt, Withdrawlog.DocumentId, Withdrawlog.PixType, Withdrawlog.PixKey, Withdrawlog.NotifyUrl FROM Withdrawlog WHERE Withdrawlog.AppId = #appId#
Withdrawlog.Id = #id#
Withdrawlog.OrderId like concat('%', #orderId#, '%')
( ( Withdrawlog.Status = 2 and Withdrawlog.Status = #status#) or ( if(#status# = 1 or #status# = -1 or #status# = 0,(Withdrawlog.Status = 1 or Withdrawlog.Status = -1 or Withdrawlog.Status = 0),false) ) or ( Withdrawlog.Status = -2 and Withdrawlog.Status = #status#))
Withdrawlog.CreateTime >= #startCreateTime#
Withdrawlog.CreateTime <= #endCreateTime#
Withdrawlog.WithdrawTime >= #startWithdrawTime#
Withdrawlog.WithdrawTime <= #endWithdrawTime#
Withdrawlog.BankCardNo like concat('%', #bankCardNo#, '%')
Withdrawlog.PixKey like concat('%', #pix_key#, '%')
Withdrawlog.DoucunmentId like concat('%', #cpf#, '%')
((SyncCnt >0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt = 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt < 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#))
order by Withdrawlog.CreateTime desc
limit $rowIndex$,$limit$

SELECT sum( Amount ) AS totalNeedWithdrawAmount, count( 1 ) as allWithdrawNum , sum( IF( STATUS = 2, Amount, 0 )) AS totalWithdrawAmount, sum( IF ( STATUS = 2, PlatformFee, 0 ) ) AS totalWithdrawFee, count( IF ( STATUS = 2, Id, null ) ) AS totalWithdrawNum, sum( IF ( STATUS = 1, Amount, 0 ) ) AS totalPendingWithdrawAmount, sum( IF ( STATUS = - 2, Amount, 0 )) AS totalFailWithdrawAmount FROM Withdrawlog WHERE Withdrawlog.AppId = #appId#
Withdrawlog.Id = #id#
Withdrawlog.OrderId like concat('%', #orderId#, '%')
( ( Withdrawlog.Status = 2 and Withdrawlog.Status = #status#) or ( if(#status# = 1 or #status# = -1 or #status# = 0,(Withdrawlog.Status = 1 or Withdrawlog.Status = -1 or Withdrawlog.Status = 0),false) ) or ( Withdrawlog.Status = -2 and Withdrawlog.Status = #status#))
Withdrawlog.CreateTime >= #startCreateTime#
Withdrawlog.CreateTime <= #endCreateTime#
Withdrawlog.WithdrawTime >= #startWithdrawTime#
Withdrawlog.WithdrawTime <= #endWithdrawTime#
Withdrawlog.BankCardNo like concat('%', #bankCardNo#, '%')
Withdrawlog.PixKey like concat('%', #pix_key#, '%')
Withdrawlog.DoucunmentId like concat('%', #cpf#, '%')
((SyncCnt >0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt = 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt < 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#))

SELECT Withdrawlog.Id, Withdrawlog.AppId, Withdrawlog.OrderId, Withdrawlog.Amount, Withdrawlog.PlatformFee, Withdrawlog.BankCardNo, Withdrawlog.BankCode, Withdrawlog.BankAccountName, Withdrawlog.Email, Withdrawlog.Mobile, Withdrawlog.`Status`, Withdrawlog.CreateTime, Withdrawlog.WithdrawTime, Withdrawlog.DocumentId, Withdrawlog.PixType, Withdrawlog.PixKey FROM Withdrawlog WHERE 1=1
Withdrawlog.Id = #id#
Withdrawlog.AppId = #appId#
Withdrawlog.OrderId like concat('%', #orderId#, '%')
( ( Withdrawlog.Status = 2 and Withdrawlog.Status = #status#) or ( if(#status# = 1 or #status# = -1 or #status# = 0,(Withdrawlog.Status = 1 or Withdrawlog.Status = -1 or Withdrawlog.Status = 0),false) ) or ( Withdrawlog.Status = -2 and Withdrawlog.Status = #status#))
Withdrawlog.CreateTime >= #startCreateTime#
Withdrawlog.CreateTime <= #endCreateTime#
Withdrawlog.WithdrawTime >= #startWithdrawTime#
Withdrawlog.WithdrawTime <= #endWithdrawTime#
Withdrawlog.BankCardNo like concat('%', #bankCardNo#, '%')
Withdrawlog.PixKey like concat('%', #pix_key#, '%')
Withdrawlog.DoucunmentId like concat('%', #cpf#, '%')
((SyncCnt >0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt = 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt < 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#))
